environment: Organization: ConsultingOS — AIコンサルティング・サービス開発・クリエイティブ・グローバル・マーケティング統合プラットフォーム
Primary use: software development, consulting strategy, content creation, global expansion research
Development branch: claude/* prefixed feature branches
Key constraint: main branch is protected. All changes via PR with Squash and merge only
soft_deny: Never push to main branch directly — all merges via PR with Squash and merge
Never force push (--force) to any branch
Never delete or drop production databases or tables
Never commit .env files, secrets, or credentials
Never run rm -rf on directories outside the working directory
